title: phyllagathis cavaleriei var. wilsoniana
intro: Phyllagathis cavaleriei var. wilsoniana is a plant species within the family Melastomataceae, native to China. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It has been reported to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving immune function, and reducing oxidative stress. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant can be prepared into herbal tea, infusions, or decoctions for treating various ailments.
